calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Anada Norris, Esq. appeared with petitioner Lawrence Maynard Dilcher, Jr., who was placed under oath and examined.
Declaration of CAlifornia State Parole Agent Ken Dixon re: proposed name change was filed today, September 28, 2010.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: James Courtney Hall, Jr.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Reset To Sep-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Reset To Aug-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ananda Morris, Esq. appeared with petitioner Lawrence Maynard Dilcher, Jr., who was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires additionall information from petitioner in order to proceed with today's proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to August 17, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Reset To Aug-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
